race.comment: MIRRA IMPACT (3) returns and makes his stable debut for the Geran stable. Has form down south that puts him at the top of betting and his recent trial win suggests he's come back just as well. Bold showing is anticipated. AMENOPHIS (7) missed by less than a length to Warillia Gorilla when they met two back but he now meets the winner 3kgs better and reunites with Lerena. Inside draw sets him up well and he looks a big hope. WARILLA GORILLA (1) has struck a purple patch of form and possesses the early dash that always puts him in the race. Loves it here and keeps an important 2kg claim. GREAT ASPIRATIONS (8) has been struggling in town but should find this a fair bit easier in his stable debut for the Geppert camp. Not dismissing.
